const bodyPreview = typeof $json.body === 'string' ? $json.body.slice(0, 160) : null;
return [{ json: { ...$json, callbackPayload: { notificationId: $json.notificationId, status: 'SENT', providerMessageId: $json.providerMessageId, summary: `n8n completed ${$json.channel.toLowerCase()} delivery for ${$json.recipient}.`, deliveredAt: new Date().toISOString(), metadata: { channel: $json.channel, recipient: $json.recipient, subject: $json.subject, bodyPreview, workflow: 'stockpilot-notification-dispatch', receivedAt: $json.receivedAt } }, responseBody: { accepted: true, message: `n8n queued ${$json.channel.toLowerCase()} delivery for ${$json.recipient}.`, providerMessageId: $json.providerMessageId, deliveryState: 'queued', receivedAt: $json.receivedAt } } }];
